title: allium fistulosum f. viviparum
intro: Allium fistulosum f. viviparum, also known as viviparous Welsh onion or walking onion, is a unique variety of the common Welsh onion, characterized by its ability to produce new plants from the top of the bulb rather than from seeds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Allium fistulosum f. viviparum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
